ham.subject: Your XYZ SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hello John,

This is a reminder that your subscription to XYZ SaaS will renew on 10 May 2026. The renewal amount is $99.99, which will be charged to the payment method on file.

If you would like to change your billing details or cancel the renewal, please log into your account at <URL> before 5 May 2026.

Thank you for using XYZ SaaS.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – FedEx Delivery Fee Due
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your recent FedEx shipment (Tracking #1234567890) was not delivered due to a missing delivery fee. A fee of $25.00 has been assessed and must be paid within 7 days of receiving this notice.

Failure to pay will result in the package being returned to sender and possible additional charges.

Please resolve this matter immediately by logging into your account at <URL> and submitting the payment.

For any questions, contact FedEx Customer Support at 1-800-555-1234.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
